description: Read, write, list, and check files on Replit projects over SSH/SFTP, plus SSH key setup.
name: io.github.mindstone/mcp-server-replit-ssh

environmentVariables.description: Optional per-request timeout in milliseconds (default 60000, max 600000).
environmentVariables.name: REPLIT_SSH_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to require pre-populated known-hosts entries. When unset (default), unknown hosts are recorded on first contact (OpenSSH `accept-new` behaviour); a fingerprint mismatch always fails closed.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_REPLIT_SSH_STRICT_HOST_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Explicit path to the connector's SSH known-hosts file. Defaults to $MCP_WORKSPACE_PATH/.replit-ssh-known-hosts, then $HOME/.replit-mcp/known_hosts.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_REPLIT_SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS_PATH

title: Replit SSH
